ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Implementation of hash tables (hash sets and hash maps) in R, featuring arbitrary R objects as keys, arbitrary hash and key-comparison functions, and customizable behaviour upon queries of missing keys.

Implementation of hash tables (hash sets and hash maps) in R, featuring arbitrary R objects as keys, arbitrary hash and key-comparison functions, and customizable behaviour upon queries of missing keys.

name: r-r2r
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '0.1.2' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-r2r
  version: {{ version|replace("-", "_") }}

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/r2r_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/r2r/r2r_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 1f8031907567790f9cb03f5dfc404862d8356ebdab32e0c1187110a6988fb61b

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
    - r-digest
    - r-rlang
  run:
    - r-base
    - r-digest
    - r-rlang

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('r2r')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('r2r')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://github.com/vgherard/r2r
  license: GPL-3.0-only
  summary: Implementation of hash tables (hash sets and hash maps) in R, featuring arbitrary
    R objects as keys, arbitrary hash and key-comparison functions, and customizable
    behaviour upon queries of missing keys.
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-3'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Package: r2r
# Title: R-Object to R-Object Hash Maps
